title: astragalus larvatus
intro: Astragalus larvatus, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a plant species within the pea family. It is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and immune-boosting properties, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and saponins. The medicinal properties of Astragalus larvatus have been found to have potential health benefits including reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing the immune system. Astragalus larvatus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and extracts, although the quality and efficacy of these preparations may vary depending on the manufacturer.
